meaning: adj.不提供信息(或资料)的,不增进知识的,不增长见闻的
examples: It was a singularly uninformative document.
The reports of the explosion were brief and uninformative.
Niantic patch notes have always been terribly uninformative. Here's what the 0.39.0 patch note said.
That implies that the Clearwire fourth quarter conference call next week will be both boring and uninformative.
Together, the tactics of agreement and evasion made for an uninformative 90 minutes.
